outputPolicy.default: new directory under the real system temporary directory
outputPolicy.authorizedOverride: --output must be inside --allow-root; the authorized root must already exist
outputPolicy.concurrency: exclusive per-target lock plus staging-directory rename
outputPolicy.cleanup: only a generator-created .autoplan-p00-staging-* sibling is removed after failure

fixtures.name: empty
fixtures.schemaOutline: effective current schema extracted from src/database.js, including ensureColumn additions and intake_plan_links
expectedAudit: schema matches the effective P003 inventory
no project or business rows
migration remains idempotent
no settings secret is generated

fixtures.name: legacy-normal
expectedAudit: ensureColumn adds project, link, session, duration and backend fields
default project and project_state are created from loop_state
legacy rows receive the default project id
scan_files is rebuilt with project_id in its primary key
legacy chat settings create a global AI config with a fake non-working key value
unscoped chat message is attached to a default conversation

fixtures.name: orphan-cross-project
fixtures.schemaOutline: current schema with deliberately inconsistent application-level relations and no foreign keys
expectedAudit: task references missing plan 999
attachment references missing owner 999
project 1 intake link references a project 2 plan
conversation references missing AI config 777
project 2 message references a project 1 conversation
audit reports orphan/cross-project risks without silently deleting rows

fixtures.name: invalid-paths
fixtures.category: invalid, traversal, missing and expired paths
fixtures.schemaOutline: current schema with synthetic relative traversal and reserved fake absolute Windows/POSIX paths
expectedAudit: ../../ traversal is rejected by realpath/allowed-root policy
reserved /__autoplan_fixture__ and Z:\__autoplan_fixture__ paths never resolve to user data
missing script cwd and expired installer fail closed
no native open or process spawn occurs while auditing

fixtures.name: large
fixtures.schemaOutline: current schema with one project/state and N requirements plus N events
expectedAudit: same seed and largeCount produce identical database bytes and hashes
different seed changes deterministic synthetic content
snapshot event limit and requirement ordering can be exercised
generation uses one in-memory transaction for bulk rows

pathCases.expected: project alpha policy rejects project beta path
if a platform test creates this synthetic symlink, realpath containment rejects it; generator itself does not require symlink privileges

sanitization.credentialPolicy: fixture-not-a-key is intentionally non-working and must never match a provider credential format
sanitization.pathPolicy: only reserved impossible roots, traversal strings and generator-owned temporary output paths are allowed

cleanup.automaticOnFailure: remove only the newly created staging directory and lock
cleanup.manualAfterSuccess: remove the generated target directory under temp/authorized root after validation
cleanup.databaseSafety: no generated database is opened by AppDatabase or Electron and no existing database is overwritten
